description: Create a complete Man Overboard (MOB) recovery drill training scenario in Bridge Command by establishing a new scenario directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/o) MOB Recovery Drill/. Configure the environment.ini for the Solent in June 2024 (between 09:00-15:00) with VisibilityRange=10.0 and Weather=3.0. Set the ownship.ini for the 'MV Celtic Mariner' south of the Isle of Wight (Lat ~50.62, Long ~ -1.15) at Heading 230 and Speed 12.0. Include three vessels in othership.ini: a stationary small boat casualty positioned ~0.4nm astern (bearing 050), a crossing container ship, and a head-on tanker, ensuring all traffic vessels have at least two waypoint legs. Update /opt/bridgecommand/bc5.ini and user configurations with arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, radar_range_resolution=256, max_radar_range=48, and hide_instruments=0. Document the drill procedures, including sections for Immediate Actions, Williamson Turn, Recovery Approach, Communications (including 'PAN PAN'), and Traffic Management, at /home/ga/Documents/mob_drill_procedures.txt.
